title: M2-04c: Add offline banner and event replay UI
acceptance_criteria: UI shows banner: 'You were offline. X events occurred while you were away.'
'View Events' button shows missed activity in feed
Events replayed into activity store with proper sequencing
deliverables: New OfflineBanner component or modification to existing
Modified ActivityFeed with missed event display
completed_summary: Implemented showOfflineBanner and missedEvents in WebSocketProvider.tsx
